name: 2'3"x3'9" Washable Persian Style Medallion Accent Rug Blue - Threshold™: Traditional Flat Pile, Machine Washable
description:
Update your indoor decor space with this Sydney Clay Pop Rug from Threshold™. The woven area rug features an eye-catching pattern in a distressed finish on a blue backdrop to beautifully accent any room's decor. The latex backing helps keep the rug in place, and since its flat pile height offers easy cleaning, it's ideal for placement in high-traffic areas like your kitchen, living room or entryway.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
